---
title: "HYP-0000-smoke: Synthetic moving-average smoke test"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
---

## Purpose

This report validates the mechanics of the Quant Lab workflow. It is not evidence
of a tradable market edge.

## Results

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path

results_path = Path("results.json")
if results_path.exists():
    results = json.loads(results_path.read_text())
    results["metrics"]
else:
    "Run `uv run quantlab run-experiment experiments/HYP-0000-smoke/config.yaml` first."
```

## Decision

Status: `revise`

Use this experiment only as a regression check for the research environment.
